summary: Iteration 11 verified: (a) sign-in placeholder reverted to 'you@w.xyz or yourname@w.xyz' (no 'peter'); (b) handle-only sign-in still works (auto-append @w.xyz); (c) wrong password stays on /signin without leaking the email; (d) Account page shows 6 rows in correct order: Two-step verification → Change password → Passkeys → Change phone number → About W → Deactivate account; (e) /settings/change-password renders cp-current/cp-new/cp-confirm/cp-submit/cp-back testIDs; (f) submit gating works for empty current, new<8 chars, and new!=confirm; (g) wrong current_password returns 401 'Current password is incorrect'; (h) full happy-path change → re-login → revert cycle confirmed via backend tests, with seed credential PeterW2026! preserved at the end; (i) Settings tab still shows W Premium, Notifications, AI Assistant, Theme, Help & Support, Mail, Account, Sign out in order; (j) /help still renders FAQ + contact form. All 5/5 backend pytest cases passed; all critical frontend flows verified via Playwright on mobile viewport.

react_native_issues.issue: RN-Web console floods with deprecation warnings: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated, use 'boxShadow'. Reference: many files use shadowColor/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius (e.g. /app/frontend/app/(auth)/signin.tsx:206).
RN-Web warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Affects multiple screens. Not blocking but should be migrated.

action_items: (Nice-to-have) Migrate deprecated RN-Web `shadow*` style props to `boxShadow` and `props.pointerEvents` to `style.pointerEvents` to silence console warnings.
(Nice-to-have) Add a testID to the 'Theme' row in /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/settings.tsx for completeness (currently no onPress and no testID).

(Optional) The wrong-current-password Alert from /app/frontend/app/settings/change-password.tsx detects 'current password' in the error message text from the api wrapper — confirm the api() helper rethrows backend `detail` verbatim so the branch `msg.includes('current password')` actually fires. Backend returns detail='Current password is incorrect'; frontend should match. Worth a manual sanity check or unit test.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/frontend/app/settings/change-password.tsx scorePassword uses 6 labels for a max score of 5 — clean and fine.
/app/frontend/app/settings/change-password.tsx correctly disables submit if next==current (subtle but useful safeguard).
Backend POST /api/auth/set-password verifies current_password before update (line 199-201 of /app/backend/routers/auth.py). Returns generic 401 with detail 'Current password is incorrect'. Good.
Backend also resets failed_logins + lock_until on successful password change — good defensive behaviour.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. The test_change_password_happy_path_then_revert test temporarily changes peter@w.xyz's password to 'PeterW2026!!' then reverts to 'PeterW2026!' within the same test — verified by a final login. Seed credential PeterW2026! is intact at the end of this iteration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Seeded user peter@w.xyz / PeterW2026! confirmed working post-test. Account screen rows are now 6 items (added 'Change password' between 2FA and Passkeys). New screen at /settings/change-password uses POST /api/auth/set-password (existing endpoint, no backend changes). testIDs: row-change-password, cp-current, cp-new, cp-confirm, cp-submit, cp-back. RN-Web Alert.alert does NOT always render text into the DOM (uses window.alert path on some flows) — to assert alert text in future Playwright tests, register a page.on('dialog', ...) listener BEFORE the click and use expect_event('dialog').
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found in this iteration. All requested behaviours work end-to-end.
